whyQoodly.label: Why Qoodly
whyQoodly.mainText: Qoodly is your steadfast partner in professional life, transforming arduous and monotonous tasks into seamless and engaging experiences.

features.feature1Text: By integrating advanced software ecosystems into your organization, Qoodly accelerates your workflow and optimizes efficiency.
features.feature2Text: Scalable, high-performance solutions engineered with cutting-edge technologies to drive your business growth.
features.feature3Text: While many software firms simply write code, we deliver tangible business results. We blend technical excellence with a customer-centric approach, building enduring and scalable digital infrastructures rather than short-term fixes.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalise content. By clicking "Accept All" you consent to our use of cookies. You can manage your preferences at any time or choose "Decline" to continue with essential cookies only.

about.heroSubtitle: We are a passionate software team based in Ankara — Çukurambar Mah. 1474. Sokak Pembe Köşk — building digital products that empower businesses and inspire users around the world.
about.missionText: Established in Ankara in 2024, our firm has been providing diverse services to various companies within the industry. We continue to manage the software contracting needs of enterprises through an innovative and sustainable perspective.
about.member1Description: Leading the team and architecting the core algorithms that power every Qoodly product.
about.member2Description: Streamlining data pipelines and building the digital connectivity infrastructure.
about.member3Description: Integrating cutting-edge AI services seamlessly into client workflows.
about.member4Description: Designing intuitive user interface architecture that harmonises aesthetics with functionality.
about.valuesIntro: While many software firms simply write code, we deliver tangible business results. We blend technical excellence with a customer-centric approach.
about.value1Description: We embrace cutting-edge technologies to build tomorrow's solutions today.
about.value2Description: Every decision we make is guided by the impact it has on our clients' success.
about.value3Description: We engineer for speed, scalability, and reliability at every layer.
about.value4Description: Our clients trust us to deliver on time, every time, without compromise.
about.faq0a: Qoodly provides end-to-end software development services including mobile application development, web development (corporate CMS, e-commerce platforms), UX/UI design, and AI integrations. Whether you need a customer-facing product or an internal enterprise tool, we cover the full lifecycle from concept to deployment.
about.faq1q: Where is Qoodly based, and do you work with international clients?
about.faq1a: We are headquartered at Çukurambar Mahallesi 1474. Sokak Pembe Köşk in Ankara, Turkey. While our roots are local, our work is global — we collaborate with businesses and startups from across different industries and geographies. Distance has never been a barrier to delivering great software.
about.faq2q: How long has Qoodly been operating?
about.faq2a: Qoodly was established in 2024. In that time we have delivered 10+ projects spanning mobile apps, corporate web platforms, and AI-powered solutions. Despite being a young studio, our team brings years of combined professional experience to every engagement.
about.faq3a: Qoodly is built by a focused, senior-level team. Toprak Özkale leads as Full Stack Developer and system architect, Eren Öz drives backend infrastructure and data pipelines, Furkan Bozdaş specialises in integrating cutting-edge AI services into client products, and Şevval Neva Durmuş serves as UI Architect shaping the aesthetic and functional dimensions of our interfaces. Together we keep the team lean and the output high-quality.
about.faq4q: What kinds of projects has Qoodly already shipped?
about.faq4a: Our portfolio includes Weekweeky — a mobile weekly planning application, GFS Global Engineering's corporate CMS which manages the company's digital presence, and an AI-powered e-commerce solution currently in development. We work across mobile, web, and intelligent systems.
about.faq5q: How does Qoodly approach a new project?
about.faq5a: We start by thoroughly understanding your business goals before writing a single line of code. Our process moves through discovery, architecture design, iterative development sprints, and structured QA. We maintain close communication throughout so there are no surprises at delivery.
about.faq6q: What technologies and stacks does Qoodly use?
about.faq6a: Our stack is chosen to match each project's needs rather than forcing a one-size-fits-all solution. We work with modern frameworks across React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, and various AI service providers. For every project we evaluate scalability, performance, and long-term maintainability.
about.faq7q: How do I get in touch to start a project?
about.faq7a: The easiest way is to head to our Contact page and fill in the form — we typically respond within one business day. You can also reach us directly by phone at +90 541 420 15 60 or via WhatsApp and LinkedIn. We are happy to arrange a no-obligation discovery call first.
about.faq8q: Does Qoodly offer ongoing support after a project is delivered?
about.faq8a: Yes. We believe a strong product relationship does not end at launch. We offer post-delivery maintenance, performance monitoring, and iterative feature development. Most of our clients continue working with us well beyond the initial project scope.

contact.heroSubtitle: How can we help you? Reach out to us for professional software engineering support. Our expert team will get back to you promptly.

work.project1Description: A mobile-focused solution that simplifies weekly planning and task management with a user-friendly interface.
work.project2Description: A customized, high-security and scalable content management platform built for large-scale enterprises.
